title: Neodissochaeta biligulata
taxonomy: Neodissochaeta biligulata is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Neodissochaeta, which is a group of ferns. The classification of Neodissochaeta biligulata places it within the class Polypodiopsida, the division Pteridophyta, and the kingdom Plantae. The plant's classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships. Further research may be necessary for a more comprehensive understanding of its classification.

intro: Neodissochaeta biligulata is a species of flowering plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The health benefits of Neodissochaeta biligulata include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, which can help to reduce inflammation and combat infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Neodissochaeta biligulata is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory disorders.
